headings: Procedures for Handling a Sick Team Member:
text: - [ ]  When a team member displays possible signs or symptoms of heat illness, a trained first aid coworker or supervisor will evaluate the sick worker and determine whether resting in the shade and drinking cool water will suffice or if emergency service providers will need to be called. A sick worker will not be left alone in the shade, as they could take a turn for the worse!  When a team member displays possible signs or symptoms of heat illness and no trained first aid worker or supervisor is available at the site, emergency service providers will be called.
